label: base-character
prompt: Greg, a warm, gentle 32-year-old White man, a hands-on dad balancing childcare and home. Short wavy light-brown hair, light stubble, warm hazel eyes, natural skin with a few freckles and faint tiredness, a kind expression. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual sweater or tee, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
